creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
Created attachment 225889
knot 3.0.7

Knot3 was upgraded to 3.0.6 yesterday.
This patch updates the port accordingly.

Tested using poudriere and portfmt.

To have zero output in portfmt I made cosmetical changes.
But basically only the version and checksums changed.

Also knot3-lib remains fine.

In case a patch from 3.0.5 rather is desired, then please let me know.
